events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: NM cable within 1¼ inches of stud face without nail plate. NEC 300.4 requires protection when cables are within 1¼ inches of framing edge, typically by steel plate. This is non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high (potential nail damage). Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective. Percent complete maybe 85. Value 1.25 (inches). Confidence high.

  "actions": [
    "Install listed steel nail plates over NM cable runs within 1¼ in. of framing edge before wall close-in",
    "Re-sheath or re-route any cables that cannot be adequately protected by plates"
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 300.4 requires cables installed in framing members to be protected by a steel plate or bushing where they are within 1¼ in. of the face of the framing. The observed NM cable lacks this protection, making the installation non-compliant and susceptible to fastener penetration.",
